concedeDialog.title: Concede Game?
concedeDialog.message: Your opponent will be declared the winner.

takebackDialog.requestedMessage: Roll the game back to the moment right before their last action?
takebackDialog.ownMessage: Waiting for the other players to approve rolling back to before your last action.

serverOfflineDialog.title: Server Offline
serverOfflineDialog.couldNotConnect: Couldn't connect to the dedicated multiplayer server.
serverOfflineDialog.switchedToP2P: Switched to P2P-only mode for this session.

sideboardModal.title: Sideboarding
sideboardModal.matchScore: Match score {{p0}}-{{p1}}{{draws}}. Move cards between main and sideboard, then submit.
sideboardModal.moveFromMain: Move cards from the main deck.

brokerOfflinePrompt.title: Lobby server unreachable
brokerOfflinePrompt.message: Your game won't be publicly listed. You can still host over P2P — just share the room code directly with your opponent.

serverOfflinePrompt.title: Matchmaking unreachable
serverOfflinePrompt.message: We couldn't reach the game server, so the public lobby is unavailable right now. You can still play by sharing a direct code with a friend.

gameListItem.buildMismatchTitle: Host is on {{version}} ({{commit}}) — your build is different. Refresh to update.
gameListItem.sandboxConfirm: This is a Sandbox game. Players with debug permission can directly manipulate game state. Continue?
gameListItem.sandboxBadgeTitle: This game allows debug actions. Use for testing — not a competitive match.

serverPicker.title: Server
serverPicker.subtitle: Pick a region, or connect to a self-hosted instance.
serverPicker.urlError: URL must start with ws:// or wss://

lobbyView.pickServerTitle: Pick a server to use online lobby mode
lobbyView.p2pNotice: Dedicated server unavailable. You can still host or join directly with a 5-character room code.
lobbyView.hostP2PDescription: Create a direct room for one opponent.
lobbyView.hostServerDescription: Open a room and wait for players.

hostSetup.p2pNotice: Dedicated server is unavailable, so this room will use a direct connection.
hostSetup.roomNameHelp: Shown to players browsing the lobby.
hostSetup.bo3Note: BO3 is available only for 2-player matches.
hostSetup.sandboxModeHelp: The host can directly manipulate the game state (move cards, change life, modify counters) and grant debug permission to other players. Use for testing or sandbox play — not for competitive matches. This setting cannot be changed once the game starts.

page.deckRejected: Deck was rejected by the host.
page.couldNotLoadDeck: Could not load deck. Try re-importing it.
page.descriptionLobby: Browse available tables, join by code, or host a new match.
page.descriptionHostSetup: Adjust format, privacy, and timing before opening the room.
page.descriptionDraftLobby: Waiting for players to join the draft pod.
page.descriptionDeckSelect: Pick the deck you want to bring online.
page.noDeckWarning: No deck selected — you'll need to pick one before hosting.

draftLobbyPanel.draftInProgress: Draft in progress. The draft view will open automatically.
